who: procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 contracts/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We notify managers 30 days in advance instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Share in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try dashboard for tracking expirations and manual entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing contract data
